  "findings": [
    "Severe, rhythmic metallic impact and clicking sounds indicating a spall or crack on the bearing raceway or rolling elements",
    "High-amplitude transient shocks superimposed on the background machine noise"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Schedule immediate shutdown and replacement of the bearing assembly",
    "Inspect the shaft and housing for secondary damage",
    "Check lubrication for metal contamination"
  ],
  "rationale": "The stethoscope recording reveals distinct, repetitive, sharp metallic impacts characteristic of a localized defect (such as a spall or crack) on the inner/outer ring or rolling elements of the bearing. This indicates a degraded to failed state that poses a high risk of catastrophic seizure if left in service.",
  "references": [
    "ISO 10816 (Vibration severity)",
    "SKF Bearing Damage and Failure Analysis Guide"
  ]
